meaning: n.鍏嶈亴,瑙ｉ泧,涓嶄簣鑰冭檻
examples: Her dismissal came as a bolt from the blue.
He sat there while I made the case for his dismissal.
She decided to sue her employer for wrongful dismissal.
His dismissal sparked a collapse which will lead to defeat for England on Tuesday.
But Gibson played down claims that falling attendances were at the heart of the dismissal.
